_note: Per-claim run exclusions for governance confidence scoring. Entries remain in matrix entries log for audit but do not contribute to claim confidence or direction counts. Reasons: code bugs, wrong module tested, or circular dependency (untestable until prerequisite fixed). Populate after governance pipeline is rebuilt.

MECH-071.reason: Wrong module: V2 experiment tested E2.predict_harm() alone. MECH-071 concerns E3.harm_eval calibration asymmetry. This run predates the correct E3-based experimental design and provides no diagnostic signal for the claim.

EXQ-085: z_goal routing bug -- GOAL_PRESENT and GOAL_ABSENT conditions produced literally identical per-seed metrics (seed=42: n_agent=907/907, cal_gap=0.1673/0.1673; seed=7: n_agent=872/872), confirming z_goal has no pathway to policy selection. Implementation wiring gap, not evidence against MECH-071.

EXQ-085b: Same z_goal routing bug as EXQ-085. Per-seed results identical across conditions -- z_goal latent exists and updates but does not modulate trajectory selection. Implementation gap, not scientific failure.

INV-034.reason: EXQ-085: z_goal routing bug (same as MECH-071 exclusion). INV-034 cannot be tested until z_goal is wired to policy selection.
EXQ-085b: Same z_goal routing bug. Non-diagnostic for INV-034.

MECH-072.reason: Wrong module: V2 experiment tested E2 alone, not the E2+E3 joint pipeline required by MECH-072 (foreseeable-harm residue gating). Non-diagnostic FAIL.

MECH-090.reason: EXQ-048: BetaGate was never called during execution. Routing path bypassed the mechanism under test. FAIL reflects broken instrumentation, not architectural failure.
EXQ-048: Duplicate entry for the same BetaGate-never-called run. Same reason: broken instrumentation.

SD-007.reason: EXQ-016: C3 metric bug -- correction computed at trajectory endpoints instead of deltas, cascading to machine-epsilon cancellation. Measurement error invalidates the FAIL; the reafference mechanism was not genuinely tested.

MECH-098.reason: EXQ-016: C3 metric bug (machine-epsilon cancellation). Also affected by alpha_world=0.3 bug suppressing z_world to 30%. FAIL is non-diagnostic.
EXQ-017: alpha_world=0.3 bug in LatentStack.encode() -- z_world suppressed to 30% responsiveness. Cannot test reafference correction claim with broken z_world encoding.
EXQ-021: alpha_world=0.3 bug still active. lstsq fix attempt on a broken z_world encoder produces no useful signal. FAIL is circular, not a scientific result.

MECH-025.reason: Substrate-limited: V2 substrate had hardcoded precision (not dynamic), SD-003 counterfactual attribution unavailable. Cannot test action-doing mode without these prerequisites.
Substrate-limited: V2 substrate had hardcoded precision (not dynamic), SD-003 counterfactual attribution unavailable. Same limitation as 20260308 run.

Substrate-limited: agent permanently committed (0 uncommitted steps). Cannot compare doing-mode vs exploration-mode signatures without uncommitted windows. Permanent commitment is a substrate design limitation.
Substrate-limited: duplicate index entry for EXQ-050. Same permanent commitment issue (0 uncommitted steps).

Substrate-limited: only 8 uncommitted steps (below C2 threshold of 10). Relative threshold calibration insufficient to break permanent commitment. Insufficient samples for interpretable causal signature comparison.

Q-007.reason: Substrate-limited: V2 substrate had no rv->z_beta pathway. Valence-regime correlation untestable. Same architectural gap as all V3 Q-007 experiments.

Substrate-limited: no rv->z_beta pathway exists in current substrate. Reward-volatility signal cannot reach z_beta control channels. Cannot test dimensional affect -> z_beta regimes without this pathway.
Substrate-limited: duplicate index entry for EXQ-051. Same missing rv->z_beta pathway.
Substrate-limited: r(rv, z_beta)=0.000 -- no rv->z_beta pathway exists. Volatility injection reaches reward but cannot propagate to z_beta control channels.
Substrate-limited: same missing rv->z_beta pathway as EXQ-051c run 1.

MECH-029.reason: Substrate-limited: agent permanently committed (running_variance ~7.5e-5 << commit_threshold). Zero uncommitted steps -- C1/C2/C3 untestable. Substrate design limitation, not signal about MECH-029.

Substrate-limited: committed_rate=0.000 in both conditions despite running_variance > threshold. E3 harm head collapsed (harm_pred_std=0.00004). Breath-oscillator proxy does not faithfully generate uncommitted windows. May require full ARC-023 + SD-006 substrate.

MECH-026.reason: Substrate-limited: agent permanently committed (running_variance ~2e-6 << commit_threshold). Zero uncommitted steps -- readiness gap unmeasurable. Substrate design limitation, not signal about MECH-026.

MECH-057a.reason: Substrate-limited: n_seq=0 in GATE_ON condition -- no committed sequences generated as actual sequences. Results identical between conditions (harm_rate 0.7244 vs 0.7244). Manual running_variance proxy insufficient. May require full ARC-023 + SD-006 substrate.

SD-009.reason: EXQ-020: Circular dependency -- ran before SD-008 alpha_world fix. z_world encoding broken (alpha=0.3 EMA suppressed to 30%), so the event contrastive supervision had no usable world signal to learn from. FAIL reflects the prerequisite bug, not the SD-009 mechanism.
EXQ-020 second run: same circular dependency. SD-008 alpha fix (alpha_world=0.9) had not yet been applied at the time of this run.
